Mod.name: Thaumic Guidance
Mod.description:
Gamepad-friendly aim assist mod for Noita — a fork of the original Aim Assist mod, fixed and improved.
When you fire a projectile, Thaumic Guidance automatically steers it toward the nearest valid enemy within a targeting cone. It checks line of sight, probes multiple points on each enemy's body, and picks the best available aim point so your shots land even on a controller.
[h2]Features[/h2]
[list] [*][b]Thaumic Guidance[/b] [i](aim assist)[/i] — redirects projectiles toward enemies within a targeting cone, prioritizing by distance and angular alignment [*][b]Arcane Identification[/b] [i](targeted enemy identification)[/i] — optionally prints the locked-on enemy's name to the game log ("Thaumic sigil bound to [enemy]!") [*][b]Warding Glyphs[/b] [i](off-screen enemy indicators)[/i] — shows directional indicators at the screen edges pointing toward off-screen enemies, with brighter glyphs for enemies in line of sight and dimmer ones for those behind cover. [/list]
These features are enabled by default once the mod is installed, but can be disabled from the Settings page.
[h2]Contributing[/h2]
Contributions are welcome on Github at [url=https://github.com/coddingtonbear/noita-thaumic-guidance]https://github.com/coddingtonbear/noita-thaumic-guidance[/url].
[h2]Credits[/h2]
Based on the original [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3613890248]Aim Assist[/url] mod for Noita by ImmortalDamned.
